title: Client Onboarding Flow
summary: Created complete client onboarding template suite: welcome email, intake questionnaire spec, 30-day roadmap, and internal onboarding checklist.

artifacts.description: Welcome email sent to new clients. Sets expectations about zoputer, communication model, security, and first steps (intake form + Calendly).

Google Forms specification for client intake. 4 sections: Context (trigger, prior attempts, friction), Environment (tools, integrations, team), Goals (30/90-day success, constraints), Preferences (communication style, timing). Estimated 10 minutes.

Shareable roadmap template. Week-by-week breakdown: Discovery & Foundation → Quick Wins → Core Build → Review & Plan. Includes success criteria from intake, communication cadence, mutual expectations.
Internal tracking for zoputer. Covers pre-onboarding through 30-day review with completion timestamps, quick wins tracking, milestone status table, and escalation triggers.

notes: Welcome email maintains advisory tone — emphasizes collaboration over handoff
Intake questionnaire designed for Google Forms with Airtable integration spec included
30-day roadmap uses table format for clarity, includes mutual commitment section
Onboarding checklist includes escalation triggers for proactive issue handling
All templates use {{placeholder}} syntax for easy variable substitution

integration_points.intake_to_airtable: Form responses should sync to Clients table
